title: He Reigns Alone

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Why do nations storm and rage
Like waves against the shore?
Their kings and rulers plot in vain
Against heaven's golden door

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From His throne above the stars
The Lord looks down and laughs
Their schemes are dust upon the wind
Their pride like broken staffs

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Find your refuge in His grace
Your fortress in His might
For those who trust His holy name
Will walk in endless light

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: "I've placed My King upon the hill
Of Zion, sacred ground
My Son, today I give to you
The nations as your crown

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ask of Me, and I will give
The earth into your hand
From sea to sea, from shore to shore
You'll rule through every land"

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Find your refuge in His grace
Your fortress in His might
For those who trust His holy name
Will walk in endless light

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Be wise now, kings of mortal realm
Take wisdom's gentle rod
Serve with joy and reverent fear
The sovereign hand of God

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Blessed are all who find their peace
Beneath His sheltering wings
When fury burns like morning sun
He guards the soul that sings

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Mountains bow and oceans kneel
Before His mighty throne
Nations rise and nations fall
But He reigns, He reigns alone

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Find your refuge in His grace
Your fortress in His might
For those who trust His holy name
Will walk in endless light

epigraph: The kings of the earth set themselves
